title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value estimation for Vulcan Materials based on a 10-year discounted cash flow model, incorporating historical free cash flow, capital intensity, and pricing power.

revenueGrowth.rationale: Modeled at 5.0% to reflect consistent price realization across aggregate materials and sustained public infrastructure demand, slightly above its recent modest historical growth.

terminalGrowthRate.rationale: Assumes long-term growth aligns with broader GDP growth and inflation, typical for mature, heavy materials providers.

discountRate.rationale: An 8.0% cost of capital reflects the cyclical but ultimately durable nature of its business model, balanced by its solid balance sheet and market dominance.
